title: Chef Aid 7cm Wide Nylon Mesh Plastic Strainer in White-Ideal for Draining, Straining, and Washing, Fruits, Vegetables, Salads and More- BPA FREE, Dishwasher Safe
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Made from high-quality white plastic nylon mesh, this strainer is both sturdy and lightweight, making it easy to handle and perfect for everyday kitchen use, BPA FREE

FINE MESH: Ideal for straining pasta, rinsing fruits and vegetables, and sifting dry ingredients such as flour. A must-have for any home cook or professional chef looking for versatility and convenience
7 CM SIZE: The strainer features a comfortable handle for a secure grip and a hook for easy storage. Its compact size ensures it fits easily into your kitchen drawers or hangs neatly on a hook
EASY TO CLEAN: The smooth plastic construction is easy to clean and dishwasher safe, ensuring hassle-free maintenance and hygiene. No need to worry about rust or difficult-to-remove food particles

AFFORDABLE QUALITY: Chef Aid delivers a high-quality kitchen tool at an affordable price, providing excellent value for money. Perfect for budget-conscious shoppers who don't want to compromise on quality
